title: Beak&Pouch's Plight
description: So nasty...Why would you eat these things?
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0db3e162d151f6f51aed4ada874530178d97d972.png)

**"Dude, that's messed up..." , "Hey, the seagulls totally deserved it." , "Okay, but what about the hamsters?" , "I was hungry, man. I had no choice."**
## Description
Adding a variety of hamster and seagull-themed dishes to your game, whether cute or nasty, they are yours to command — to tame or to slaughter?

P.S. Maybe eating these will turn you into one of them.

_"I'm just hungry. Hopefully."_

## Update Plan
- Advancements
- ~~More Dishes (Coming Soon)~~

## Q&A
Q:Can I use this mod into my modpack?

A:Sure, make sure to credit, and don't claim Beak & Pouch's Plight as your own creation。

Q:What is the relationship between this mod and the previous Hamster's Delight?

A:Beak & Pouch's Plight is a remastered version of Hamster's Delight, featuring more content and being more refined.
